findings.code_evidence: No file or parameter named `governance` / `f09_governance_indicator` exists anywhere in modules/, core/, or config/. The 09_drivers manifest (modules/09_drivers/input/files:1-5) lists only f09_gdp_mer_iso.csv, f09_gdp_ppp_iso.csv, f09_pop_iso.csv, f09_urban_iso.csv, fm_gdp_defl_ppp.cs4.
findings.verify_cmd: grep -rln 'governance' modules/ core/ config/ -> no output (empty); positive control grep -rln 'f09_pop_iso' modules/ -> hits modules/09_drivers/input/files etc.

findings.code_evidence: No `urbanpop_grid` / `f09_urbanpop` reference exists in the tree. The actual urban driver file in the 09_drivers manifest is `f09_urban_iso.csv` (modules/09_drivers/input/files:6), an ISO-level CSV, not a gridded .cs3.

Actual filename is `f15_supply2intake_ratio_FAO_iso.cs3` (with _iso suffix). modules/15_food/anthro_iso_jun22/input.gms:250 has $include "./modules/15_food/input/f15_supply2intake_ratio_FAO_iso.cs3"; the manifest modules/15_food/input/files lists f15_supply2intake_ratio_FAO_iso.cs3 and f15_supply2intake_ratio_bottomup.cs3 (no bare _FAO variant).

results.notes: Doc is highly accurate on all load-bearing claims: realizations/defaults (yields managementcalib_aug19, trade selfsuff_reduced, livestock fbask_jan16), var domains, q14/q52 equations + citations, carbon-density populator/reader chain, trade v21_trade vs v21_excess realization split, time sets, regions, cell ranges, calib/lambda formulas, model decl, postsolve. 3 stale/nonexistent input filenames in the data-source catalog (sec 1.2) are the only code contradictions; all Minor (descriptive examples, recoverable). lpj_grper_0.5.mz / ipcc_climate_zones_c200.mz are top-level runtime input files not in worktree - unverifiable, not flagged.

All load-bearing claims verified against code: realizations/defaults (landmatrix_dec18, default, flexreg_apr16, price_aug22), all equation+variable names/domains, consumer counts (vm_land=10, pcm_land=12, vm_prod_reg=8, M11 depends on 27 modules), cost attributions, and file:line citations all match. Cross-doc pointers (Module_Dependencies.md) not code-checkable. No contradictions found.

All load-bearing claims verified correct: realization defaults (yields/trade/carbon/ghg/forestry/AEI/tc/M39 calib), pcm_* citations (M10:9, M56:8, M13:16), q14_yield_crop=vm_tau vs q14_yield_past=pcm_tau (lines 14-16/35-39), q10_land_area, vm_carbon_stock declared M56 not M52, q52_emis_co2_actual, q21 names + vm_import/export absence, s56_buffer_aff=0.5, s56_c_price_induced_aff=1. Pseudocode simplifications (=l= vs =g=, kall vs k) are labeled illustrative and semantically faithful; not bugs.

findings.flagged_claim: pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac is 'Populated by: Module 32 (owner; modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/declarations.gms:9, set in modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/preloop.gms:71)'. The parameter is actually DECLARED and primarily POPULATED in Module 52 (carbon), not Module 32. Module 32 only READS the sibling _uncalib version and has no ownership, declaration, or population role for the calib parameter.
findings.doc_location: Section 5.1 Multi-Module Parameters, Carbon System bullet, line 295
findings.bug_class: Latent doc error (wrong producer/owner attribution) — class 15 / Pattern: wrong module attribution
findings.code_evidence: modules/52_carbon/normal_dec17/declarations.gms:9 = ' pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac(t_all,j,ac,ag_pools)   Vegetation secondary forest carbon density...'. Calibration overwrite at modules/52_carbon/normal_dec17/preloop.gms:71 = 'pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac(t_all,j,ac,"vegc") = fm_carbon_density(...)*(1-exp(...))**...'. Module 32 declarations.gms contains NO such token; module 32 preloop.gms:71 is 'p32_net_present_value(t_all,j,ac) = ...' (unrelated). Module 32's ONLY references are reads of the _uncalib sibling at presolve.gms:59,68. (Doc's line numbers 9 and 71 happen to be correct for Module 52, indicating a 52->32 module-path mislabel. The doc's 'Read by' lines — M14 presolve:44, M35 presolve:248-251 — and the '29/32/35 read uncalib' note ARE correct.)
findings.verify_cmd: grep -n 'pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac' modules/52_carbon/normal_dec17/declarations.gms -> '9: pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac(...)' '10: ..._uncalib(...)'. grep -n 'pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac' modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/declarations.gms -> exit 1 (no match). grep -rn 'pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac' modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/*.gms -> only presolve.gms:59,68 (both _uncalib reads). sed -n '69,73p' modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/preloop.gms -> p32_net_present_value. sed -n '69,75p' modules/52_carbon/normal_dec17/preloop.gms -> the calib overwrite assigning pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac.

results.notes: Doc is overwhelmingly accurate: realizations/defaults, q14 equation (eq.gms:14-16), var declarations/domains, v21_trade vs excess_prod, region set, cell ranges, model block+iterlim/reslim (main.gms:279-282), lambda formula, oq52 postsolve, t_all range all verify. Sole contradiction: sec 5.1 attributes pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac ownership/declaration/population to M32; actually M52. Line nums 9/71 are M52's. Critical per R20/G2 wrong-producer anchor.

findings.bug_class: Latent doc error / wrong producer-consumer attribution (inverted data-flow arrow)
findings.code_evidence: pm_demand_forestry is DECLARED in module 73, not 32: /tmp/magpie_develop_ro/modules/73_timber/default/declarations.gms:11 'pm_demand_forestry(t_ext,i,kforestry) ... Extended demand for timber'. It is POPULATED (LHS '=') in module 73: /tmp/magpie_develop_ro/modules/73_timber/default/preloop.gms:49,51,83. Module 32 only READS it (RHS-only): /tmp/magpie_develop_ro/modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/presolve.gms:186,199,201,204,210-211. Module 32 has 0 declarations and 0 LHS assignments of it. Real flow is 73 -> 32, the doc's arrow (32 -> 73) is inverted.
findings.verify_cmd: grep -c 'pm_demand_forestry' modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/declarations.gms -> 0 ; grep -c 'pm_demand_forestry' modules/73_timber/default/declarations.gms -> 1 ; grep -rnE 'pm_demand_forestry *\([^)]*\) *=' modules/32_forestry/ -> (none) ; grep -rnE 'pm_demand_forestry *\([^)]*\) *=' modules/73_timber/ -> preloop.gms:49,51,83 (positive control). Direction is 73->32, not 32->73.

results.notes: Forestry doc largely accurate. Verified correct: vm_prod_forestry(32->73), vm_prod_natveg(35->73), vm_carbon_stock declared in M56, M14 consumer citations (30:15, 31:18, 17 presolve:10), nlp_apr17/lp_nlp_apr17 optimization claim, fert-cost attribution. One inverted arrow: pm_demand_forestry is 73->32, not 32->73 as doc claims.
